---
title: "The Very Rev. Richard William Church"
---

## The Very Rev. Richard William Church

**Dates:** (1815-1890)

### Description

Vicar of Whatley, Dean of St. Paul’s

### Biography

He married (1853) Helen Frances Bennett (1826/7-1905).

### Letters

- Letter from [1891]
- Letter from June 2d 1890
- Letter from March 25th 1878
- Letter from April 21st 1867
- Letter from [1864]
- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
